name: Ainos, Inc.
summary: Ainos, Inc. is a Texas-incorporated dual-platform company advancing AI-based scent digitization technologies and immune therapeutics. Its core platform, AI Nose, integrates gas sensor arrays with proprietary smell language model (SLM) AI to digitize volatile organic compound signals into machine-readable Smell ID data for industrial and healthcare applications. The company also develops VELDONA, a low-dose oral interferon alpha formulation targeting rare, autoimmune, and infectious disease indications, and has commercialized VELDONA Pet supplements in Taiwan.
